selection_rationale: Deliberately diverse mix across format types (listicle, masterclass, rant, monologue, strategy) and durations (1171s to 4776s). Avoided extreme outliers (>9000s and <600s). Independent selection — did NOT consult voter1 picks.

picks.title: 15 Brutal Truths I Know at 36 That I Wish I Knew at 20
picks.reason: Numbered listicle structure — likely shows ranked-hierarchy animation patterns Tella cited

picks.title: 14 Years of Marketing Advice in 35 Minutes
picks.reason: Long-form teaching — likely heavy use of slide cards, definition pops, and tweet/quote cards

picks.title: How To Grow ANY Business FASTER (Masterclass)
picks.reason: Longest pick — full masterclass format, expected heavy frame-graphics density

picks.title: It took me 36 years to realize what I'll tell you in 26 minutes
picks.reason: Reflective rant — tests whether monologue-style videos use animations or stay pure talking head

picks.title: Give me 20 Minutes and I'll Give You Back 20 Years of Your Life
picks.reason: Shorter rant — tests density of animations in compressed teaching format

picks.title: Making Money is a Game (Here's the Cheat Code)
picks.reason: Strategy framing — likely uses game-mechanic visualizations, frameworks, equations
